hero.title: Report violations against cyclists
hero.subtitle: Your report strengthens the safety of those who ride
stats.title: Collective Impact
step1.title: Register
step1.desc: Report the type of violation, location, and details of the incident
step2.title: Map It
step2.desc: Your report appears on the map to raise awareness among other cyclists
step3.title: Mobilize
step3.desc: The data helps push for urban mobility policies
hero.heading: CYCLIST, REPORT IT!
hero.description: Traffic violence doesn't start with a hit-and-run.
hero.secondLine: It's time to give <1>visibility</1> to what you experience on the streets.
email.banner.semEmail: Your account has no registered email.

welcome.title: So glad you're here!
welcome.description: We are a citizen platform that fosters Cycling Activism, focused on the urban cyclist and spreading information about existing initiatives. Find the community that welcomes you!
welcome.observation: Note: The data does not automatically generate formal reports. Look for <1>Cycling Activism Initiatives</1> already existing in your area, and strengthen local cycling activism with your experiences! <5>Formal reports: call the police.</5>
